summary:
Training completed in 13.5 hours (11 epochs).
Best performance achieved at epoch 11.

Key Metrics:
- mAP@50: 0.8213 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
- mAP@50-95: 0.5008 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
- Precision: 0.7924 (accuracy of positive predictions)
- Recall: 0.7624 (completeness of detections)

Final Loss: 1.3874
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.5008 indicates strong overall detection accuracy
✅ High recall: 0.7624 - model captures most objects in images
✅ High precision: 0.7924 - low false positive rate
recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
